patches.summary: Suppress terminal echo in promptSecret using golang.org/x/term.ReadPassword.
patches.reason: bufio.NewScanner reads plaintext from stdin with no echo suppression — the user's password was visible as they typed on all platforms.

patches.summary: Print a warning when the --max-pages cap is hit during sync.
patches.reason: The sync loop silently stopped at 50 pages with no message; users with large histories received an incomplete sync without realizing it.

patches.summary: Enable WAL journal mode, foreign-key enforcement, and 5s busy-timeout on the local SQLite store.
patches.reason: openLocalDB used bare sql.Open defaults — no WAL, no busy-timeout, and FOREIGN KEY constraints declared in initLocalSchema were silently unenforced.

patches.summary: Add OpenDB and change Upsert/ExistsOnDate/TableExists to accept *sql.DB; open the dashboard connection once before the sync loop.
patches.reason: dashboard.Upsert and ExistsOnDate each called sql.Open+Close, creating a fresh connection per workout; sharing one *sql.DB across the loop avoids the per-row overhead.

patches.summary: Fix newCUID to emit 25-character lowercase-alphanumeric IDs matching Prisma's cuid() format.
patches.reason: Previous implementation prefixed a full UUID string (37 chars with hyphens) with 'c'; Prisma cuid() expects c + 24 lowercase alphanumeric chars.
gravitus-sync writes to two SQLite databases; the read-only hint caused MCP hosts to either skip permission gating or refuse to run the command entirely.

patches.summary: Add PRAGMA foreign_keys=ON (plus WAL and busy_timeout) to OpenDB; add FK constraint and cascade-delete test.
patches.reason: OpenDB opened without foreign_keys=ON so ON DELETE CASCADE on ExerciseSet never fired; re-syncing an existing session orphaned ExerciseSet rows on every update.

patches.summary: Fix updated counter to correctly reflect re-synced workouts instead of always showing 0.
patches.reason: localWorkoutExists was called only for the skip gate; workouts processed in --full mode always incremented added rather than updated.

patches.summary: Add shell-history warning to --password flag description.
patches.reason: Passing a credential via flag exposes it in ps output and shell history; description now advises users to omit the flag and use the interactive prompt instead.
